facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and you spot a place called Crab Island. You almost keep walking. Don't. 4.5 stars across 350 reviews. Fresh seafood, right on Phu Quoc's main strip. Order the crab. Sit down. You'll understand why it keeps filling up. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Crab on the table in under 10 minutes. Crab Island | Taste of Seafood hits different when the seafood is this fresh. 4.5 stars, 350 reviews, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Don't walk past it.

instagram.caption: Walked past it twice. Then I saw the reviews. Crab Island | Taste of Seafood, 4.5 stars, 350 people don't lie. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Fresh crab. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.5 stars. You almost missed this one.

tiktok.caption: Almost skipped Crab Island on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.5★ 350 reviews later, big regret. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
